# Exergy

> Exergy (Exergy LLC, Denver, CO) designs and installs building-integrated Bitcoin mining systems for homes and commercial buildings. A Bitcoin miner converts 100% of its electricity to heat — the same heat a building already pays for — so integrating miners into heating infrastructure displaces heating costs, monetizes excess solar generation, and earns Bitcoin from energy that was already being spent.

Exergy offers three service tiers — Self-Serve (free tools and open-source integrations), Guided (remote consulting), and Done-For-You (full design and installation) — plus Exergy Relay: remote monitoring, alerts, and monthly performance reporting via a 5% hashrate split. Exergy publishes open-source Home Assistant integrations for controlling Bitcoin miners as smart building appliances. Supported integration types: smart zone heaters, in-duct forced air, hydronic/radiant, water/pool/spa, and excess solar.

## Key pages

- [Services](https://exergyheat.com/services): Self-Serve, Guided, and Done-For-You service tiers plus Exergy Relay monitoring
- [Products](https://exergyheat.com/products): control systems, integrations, and vetted mining-heat hardware
- [Learn](https://exergyheat.com/learn): how building-integrated mining works — guides and educational resources
- [FAQ](https://exergyheat.com/faq): costs, ROI, noise, technical setup, and building fit
- [Case Studies](https://exergyheat.com/case-studies): real residential and commercial installs with performance data
- [About](https://exergyheat.com/about): team, mission, and company background
- [Newsroom](https://exergyheat.com/newsroom): announcements, research, and press
- [Contact](https://exergyheat.com/contact): contact@exergyheat.com — 3700 N Franklin St, Denver, CO 80205

## Tools & docs

- [Calculators](https://calc.exergyheat.com): free mining-heat economics calculators
- [Documentation](https://docs.exergyheat.com): technical documentation
- [GitHub](https://github.com/exergyheat): open-source Home Assistant integrations

- [Book a call](https://exergyheat.com/book-call): free intro consultation
